ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prior instruction given to Christie

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where the flashcards will be stored

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder from which to load conversation agent templates.
ast.target: 加载对话代理模板的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prior instruction given to Socrates

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The most recent number of messages to remember. Fewer is faster and cheaper but less accurate.
ast.target: 要记住的最近消息数量。数量越少，速度越快、成本越低，但准确性也越低。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically send Socrates' transcription after recording
ast.target: 录音后是否自动发送Socrates的转录文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The voice to use for text to speech
ast.target: 用于文本转语音的声音

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The speed modifier to use for text to speech relative to normal
ast.target: 相对于正常速度的文本转语音速度调节器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically speak the reply once Socrates has finished replying
ast.target: Socrates回复完成后是否自动朗读回复

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The max tags Darwin should recommend

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Darwin will only suggest tags that already exist in the vault
ast.target: 如果启用，Darwin将只建议知识库中已存在的标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If 'Only Existing Tags' is enabled, Darwin will not choose from vault tags that match these tag families. Wild cards are supported. Otherwise tags match exactly to be excluded.
ast.target: 如果启用了“仅限现有标签”，Darwin将不会从匹配这些标签族的知识库标签中选择。支持通配符。否则，标签必须精确匹配才会被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The minimum number of times a tag must appear in the vault to be shown to Darwin. Darwin does better with fewer tags to choose from.
ast.target: 标签在知识库中必须出现的最低次数才会显示给Darwin。Darwin在可选标签较少时表现更好。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The style of new tags that Darwin will suggest

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where templates are stored.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prior instruction given to Polo

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show files in the folder structure (costs more tokens)
ast.target: 是否在文件夹结构中显示文件（消耗更多代币）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show the contents of files (costs more tokens)
ast.target: 是否显示文件内容（消耗更多代币）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model to use for generating text

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language used in AI's speech recognition

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The randomness of the generated text

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The diversity of the generated text

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Min tag count to show to Darwin
ast.target: 显示给Darwin的最低标签计数

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在文件夹结构中显示文件

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Darwin: Tag all untagged files in folder
ast.target: Darwin：标记文件夹中所有未标记的文件

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Polo: Move all files in folder
ast.target: Polo：移动文件夹中的所有文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请输入一个有效的数字

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Asking for new file location suggestions
ast.target: 正在请求新文件位置建议

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学置于显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度（以 em 为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的 2 参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，则会抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的大小（例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中）都将被限制在 maxSize ems 以内。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定次数，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected element after head. Expected the element before `</head>`
ast.target: head 后出现意外元素。期望在 `</head>` 之前的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments
ast.target: 意外的 `>` 或 `->`。期望 `-->` 来关闭注释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the public identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在公共标识符之后出现闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the identifier identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在标识符之后出现闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望十进制引用使用 `[0-9]`，十六进制引用使用 `[0-9a-fA-F]`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<![CDATA[` in HTML. Remove it, use a comment, or encode special characters instead
ast.target: HTML 中出现意外的 `<![CDATA[`。请删除它，使用注释，或对特殊字符进行编码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)
ast.target: 字符引用意外地高。期望字符引用最多为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first
ast.target: 意外的闭合标签。期望先关闭其他标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 意外的控制字符 `%x`。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 引用中出现意外的控制字符。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`
ast.target: 意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 内使用文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once
ast.target: 意外的重复属性。期望属性只出现一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag
ast.target: 意外的结束标签。应无结束标签或另一个结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为标签名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `]]>` 以关闭 CDATA

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `-->` 以关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为有效的文档类型（如 `<!doctype html>`）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为文本或闭合标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `>` 以关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应为 `-->` 以关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 `<!--` 以打开注释

ast.name: description
ast.target: `%c` 处的意外序列。应为 `public` 或 `system`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head
ast.target: 意外的文档类型。应在 head 之前声明文档类型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype
ast.target: 意外的开始标签 `<head>`。应在文档类型之后直接使用 `<head>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应为属性值或无 `%c-1`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else
ast.target: 应在任何其他内容之前使用 `<!doctype html>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead
ast.target: `%c` 处意外的文档类型结尾。应为 `html`

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 `public` 的标识符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 `system` 的标识符（建议：`\"about:legacy-compat\"`）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<noscript>`. Expected a closing tag or a meta element
ast.target: 意外的 `<noscript>`。应为闭合标签或 meta 元素

ast.name: description
ast.target: 应为 `<!doctype html>` 或 `<!doctype html system \"about:legacy-compat\">`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为闭合标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为空白、`/`、`>`、`=` 或可能是 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Quote the attribute value to include it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请将属性值用引号括起来以包含它

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Add an attribute name before it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请在其前面添加属性名

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码位 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应在其后跟 `>` 或在带引号的属性值中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references
ast.target: 意外的字符引用。应为已知的命名字符引用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Instance does not match any subschemas.
ast.target: 实例不匹配任何子模式。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Instance does not match every subschema.
ast.target: 实例不匹配所有子模式。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Items did not match additional items schema.
ast.target: 项目不匹配附加项模式。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Array is empty. It must contain at least one item matching the schema.
ast.target: 数组为空。它必须包含至少一个匹配模式的项。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Array does not contain item matching schema.
ast.target: 数组不包含匹配模式的项。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Items did not match unevaluated items schema.
ast.target: 项目不匹配未评估项模式。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Aborted due to condition callback returning false.
ast.target: 由于条件回调返回 false 而中止。
